tests.description: ATDD backend acceptance tests for Story 4.1 distributed cycle lock ownership with fail-open behavior (RED PHASE)
acceptance_criteria_covered: Settings expose distributed cycle lock feature flag and positive TTL margin controls
Coordination protocol exposes structured outcomes for acquired/yielded/fail_open states
Distributed cycle lock acquisition uses Redis SET NX EX with aiops:lock:cycle key and interval+margin TTL
Non-holder contenders yield interval ownership when lock contention occurs
Redis lock-attempt failures return fail_open outcomes with degraded reason context
Coordination observability metrics expose acquired/yielded/fail_open counters
Hot-path scheduler source contains distributed lock feature-flag gating and fail-open/yield branch handling

summary: Generated 7 failing backend ATDD tests for Story 4.1
